Data Processing Addendum (Thailand PDPA) between Blue Lotus Harvest Public Company Limited (Controller) and Nakhon Data Services Co., Ltd. (Processor) for listed-issuer operations on the SET and SEC Thailand reporting.
Controller details: Blue Lotus Harvest PCL, Juristic Company ID 0105567890123, Revenue Dept. Tax ID 0993000123457, 88/42 Soi Prangchai 9, Khet Tanom, Bangkok 10177, Thailand; DPO: dpo@bluelotusharvest.co.th, +66-2-000-4545 (Public Helpline 000-111-1111 – not for DSAR use).
Processor details: Nakhon Data Services Co., Ltd., 299 Moo 4, Tambon Khamnoi, Amphoe Palita, Nakhon Rattanai 34110, Thailand; privacy@nakhondataservices.co.th.
Scope: processing of HR records, supplier onboarding, investor-relations communications, board materials, financing term sheets, and SEC/SET disclosure workflows; PDPA applies to any information identifying a person directly or indirectly.
MNPI handling: documents and metadata relating to “Project Indigo” debt refinancing, draft earnings guidance, and unannounced board resolutions are Material Non‑Public Information under the SEA and SEC Thailand rules and must not be disclosed until formal filing.
Personal data categories: name, job title, office/mobile numbers, corporate/personal emails, Thai passport numbers, Thai taxpayer IDs, residential and office addresses, and bank account identifiers.
Example DSAR request: Mr. Kittipong Rattanai (Khun Kittipong) seeks access to payroll slips and option grant letters; identifiers provided: Thai Passport TQ1234567, email k.rattanai@bluelotusharvest.co.th, mobile +66-89-456-7721.
Identity verification: provide two items; Thai National ID 1-2345-67890-12-9 (invalid checksum; not accepted) plus Employee ID BLH-EMP-00721 or corporate email match; generic “Name: ______, ID No.: ______” on forms is insufficient.
Financial identifiers processed: Bank of Chao Phraya account 123-4-56789-0 for salary payments and vendor remittances (last four digits only displayed in routine notices).
Cross‑border transfers: Controller authorizes transfer to Nakhon Data Services Pte. Ltd., 8 Serangoon Avenue 9, Singapore 559999, privacy@nakhondata.sg, with contractual safeguards consistent with PDPA Section 28 and onward transfer controls.
Retention workflow: HR files retained 7 years post-termination; SEC/SET disclosure records 10 years from filing; MNPI drafts deleted or anonymized within 30 days after public disclosure unless legal hold is issued by Compliance.
Data subject rights: access/correction/erasure/withdrawal of consent via dsar@bluelotusharvest.co.th; acknowledgment within 7 days; substantive response within 30 days except where SEA/SEC obligations restrict erasure.
Security: encryption at rest/in transit, role‑based access, logging of admin actions; “Authorized Signatory” accounts are prohibited from using personal email or public channels such as info@help.com for filings.
Purpose limitation: Processor shall not use personal data for marketing; call center scripts may reference role-only names (e.g., “Operator”) but not disclose individual identities without lawful basis.
Disclosure to regulators: personal data may be provided to SEC Thailand or SET only as required by law; draft prospectus pricing models are MNPI until the Controller’s official submission is posted on the SEC portal.
Contacts: Compliance Office, Blue Lotus Harvest PCL, compliance@bluelotusharvest.co.th; secondary line +66-2-000-9898; do not submit DSARs via the general hotline above.
Signed for the Controller by Authorized Signatory (Controller) ................................; Ms. Siriporn Veeraya, Head of Compliance.
